programme.title: Rediscovering China
programme.desc: Rediscovering China is a half-hour documentary program on CGTN. Each edition offers unique insight into various aspects of life in China today. With unrivalled access to the country's people and places, the program aims to show the global audience an inclusive and vigorous China.

programme.title: Memories
programme.desc: From the creative supervision of Katsuhiro OTOMO ('STEAMBOY', 'SHORT PEACE'), comes 'MEMORIES', a three-part work based on OTOMO's three original stories. ('MAGNETIC ROSE') Set in outer space at the end of the 21st century, the 1st part tells the story of two engineers who encounter the apparition of a female opera singer in an abandoned space freighter... ('STINK BOMB') The 2nd story is a satirical tale of a young lab technician who accidentally swallows experimental pills... ('CANNON FODDER') The 3rd part depicts war-time life in an imaginary world, using a characteristic camerawork.

E2 - Trawlers In Peril
programme.desc: An immersive trip aboard the Breton trawler ''Le Magellan''. Ten days to the rhythm of a net that needs to be raised every 4 hours, followed by sorting, gutting and storing the fish in the hold. Ten days alongside this chain gang of the seas and their worries.

programme.title: E91
programme.desc: An interactive programme that's as fun as it is informative and reactive to the meteorological events of the moment. Reports from the regions and special subjects in the studio offer an easy way to better understand the impact weather has on health, nature, history and everyday life.

programme.title: E27 - In Fougeres (2)
programme.desc: Flavie Flament goes to Fougeres, to the market, to meet its inhabitants. Today, she takes an interest in Fougeres granite and in the Gallo language, one of the langues d'oil of Upper Brittany.

programme.title: E8 - Nathalie Lasselin, Diving Guide In France
programme.desc: In France, Nathalie Lasselin welcomes cave diving enthusiasts. Together they explore an abandoned limestone quarry in Saint-Meme-les-Carrieres, before discovering the famous Le Ressel cave. Renowned for its incredible network of underground karst passages, the Lot is one of the world's leading areas for cave diving.

programme.title: E13 - Sandra Benhamou/Pelagia Kolotouros/Marie-Cecile Kfouri
programme.desc: In the heart of Brittany, visit the Pont-Aven museum. Interior design and a passion for cinema come together in Sandra Benhamou's world. Lacoste reinvents itself under the leadership of Pelagia Kolotouros. Patient and meticulous, restorer Marie-Cecile Kfouri brings frescoes and old canvases back to life.

programme.title: E11 - An Organization Feeding Thousands Year-Round
programme.desc: MultiCaf fights food insecurity in Quebec, where the demand for assistance is skyrocketing. Also: organizing your kitchen to reduce waste; breaking senior isolation with cooking workshops; a reinvented take on the traditional shepherd's pie.

programme.title: E9 - Verviers
programme.desc: Verviers is located in the basin of the Vesdre valley and has an urban landscape that tells the story of its past flourishing wool industry. We go discovering!

programme.title: E91
programme.desc: An interactive programme that's as fun as it is informative and reactive to the meteorological events of the moment. programme.title: E1 - Growing Ai
programme.desc: Artificial intelligence will help us produce more and more effectively. But some major challenges with AI need to be taken into account, including accessibility to technology and sharing data collected.

programme.desc: Loic Ballet delves into the underground of Ardeche. Underground, you can sleep in a guest room and even taste bottles aged in the unique atmosphere of the Saint-Marcel Cave.

programme.title: E4 - Stephane Bonnat's Mexico
programme.desc: Master chocolate-maker, heir to a tradition dating back to the 18th century, Stephane Bonnat takes us to explore his lands in Mexico, source of his cocoa beans, before discovering the finished product in Voiron, Isere. From bean to bar, all you ever wanted to know about a great chocolate.

programme.title: E12 - Alone In The World
programme.desc: Alexis and Thomas are in complete autonomy deep in the remote wilderness of Kluane National Park. Facing unpredictable weather and no emergency support, their knowledge is put to the test.

programme.title: E903 - Meet the Purrents / Apartment Complex
programme.desc: When Lori and Bobby find a kitten, they decide to coparent and swap the kitten back and forth between their homes. // After telling her family how great her apartment is, Lori unknowingly entices her sisters to secretly take over her space.

programme.title: E204 - The Wrath of Shmandor / There Goes the Neighborhood
programme.desc: The tiny futuristic city of Shmandor exacts revenge on Patrick Star. // Patrick and Squidina go on location to interview their neighbors.

programme.title: E412 - Lucretia Seizes Power
programme.desc: Gargamel needs someone to watch over the Smurfs he's captured, so he brings Lucretia, Rowena's doll, to life.

programme.title: E513 - Hurl, Interrupted / Diamonds are for Never
programme.desc: Lynn tries to stall her friends from riding the new coaster at Dairyland before they find out her big secret. // After Lola and Mr. Grouse find a precious gem, the two struggle to decide who gets to watch over it.

programme.title: E610 - Bummer Camp
programme.desc: When Gramps struggles to run Camp Mastadon, the kids come to his rescue.

programme.title: E179 - Extreme Sports / Squirrel Record
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick try to join the extreme sports team The Drasticals. // Sandy finds a book of world’s records, and tries to break them all with SpongeBob’s help.

programme.title: E111 - Tide and Prejudice
programme.desc: The Thundermans are visited by High Tide, the former protector of Secret Shores. But when they explain to him that they are the new superheroes in town, he decides to take back his old role, even if it puts Jinx and Booch in danger.

programme.title: E110 - Rex Dies
programme.desc: As the kids prepare for a big play, Rex is accidentally sucked into a giant fan and Tori is responsible. Robbie is an emotional wreck and it's up to Tori to save the day by saving Rex's life.

programme.title: E105 - Mar-Snoop / Canteen Carnage
programme.desc: On her quest to get her own Marsupilami, Bibi encounters a Jaguar which scares her enough to give up the hunt. // Marcel gets a job as the school chef after Jade causes the usual one to quit.

programme.title: E202 - Intern for the Worse / The Old and the Restless
programme.desc: Tensions run high when Lincoln and Clyde both get an internship at Flip's and compete to win the manager title. // When Lincoln sees how tame Pop Pop has gotten in his older age, he takes him out for a day to remember.

programme.title: E507 - Cow Pie Kid
programme.desc: Lynn pushes Liam to his limits when he becomes the star pitcher for the middle school baseball team.

programme.title: E407 - Zoo U / A Remembrance of Grand-Past
programme.desc: The Star family goes on a college tour for Patrick... at the zoo. // GrandPat shares his life stories to spoil every movie at the theater.

programme.title: E412 - Papa Smurf Lost His Mind
programme.desc: After a knock to the head, Papa Smurf loses his memory and starts acting like a child. There's only one solution: take him to Gargamel.

programme.desc: Gargamel needs someone to watch over the Smurfs he's captured, so he brings Lucretia, Rowena's doll, to life.

programme.desc: The older sisters reluctantly let Lynn into their babysitting club but she quickly proves to be too aggressive.

programme.title: E115 - Picnic
programme.desc: Peppa and her family go for a picnic. Daddy Pig falls asleep after eating so much, but then gets some exercise being chased by a wasp!

programme.title: E212 - The Invasion / Prank Day
programme.desc: Barbalala receives a package and discovers little pink animals inside, which she calls the SQUEAKIES. // Barbabravo, Barbalala and Barbabeau are fed up with their brothers and sisters laughing at their expense.

programme.title: E115 - The Fuchsia Ocean / Zero Waste
programme.desc: Chemical sprays are making the countryside rosy! The Barbapapas' build an aviary to protect sick birds. // When they see a beach covered with rubbish, the Barbapapa family decides to clean the beach and use the trash to make a miniature golf course.

programme.title: E101 - Shooting Star / Ball / Balloon
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy, Tia and Dad get stuck on a remote asteroid. // Tim, Kai and Tommy try to get their ball back from Mum's bedroom. // Tia's new balloon gets stuck in a tree, so Tim tries to get it down.

programme.title: E201 - Happy Parky
programme.desc: Tim and Kai try to give Parky the best day ever.

programme.title: E201 - Storm
programme.desc: When a storm keeps the Rexes at home they must think of a game to pass the time.

programme.title: E807 - Tool Truck Blaze
programme.desc: When three construction emergencies break out all over town, Blaze must save the day by becoming: Tool Truck Blaze! With a toolbox full of amazing tools, Blaze is ready to hammer, drill and saw through any obstacle in his way! Tool Truck Power!

programme.title: E309 - The Crew Builds An Art Museum / The Crew Builds A Giant Alphorn
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew build the perfect place to show off River's ever-changing photography projects... Builder Cove's own art museum! // Farmer Zoe has a new goat on her farm! But when she can't find the singing goat, the pups team up with Park Ranger Rose.

programme.title: E307 - Learning To Fly / Queen Swiper
programme.desc: Dora and Boots help Dulce the Dragon learn to fly so she can reach her parents at Cloudy Caves. // After La Reina and Swiper's bodies were switched by Big Red Chicken's magic, Dora and Boots help them switch back!

programme.title: E312 - The Crew Builds A Giant Tunnel
programme.desc: Park Ranger Rose and Rubble & Crew discover a meteorite outside of Builder Cove! But when Speed Meister and Mega Meister try to take it, the pups need their giant construction vehicles to save the town and get the meteorite to the Science Center.

programme.title: E115 - The Fuchsia Ocean / Zero Waste
programme.desc: Chemical sprays are making the countryside rosy! The Barbapapas' build an aviary to protect sick birds. // When they see a beach covered with rubbish, the Barbapapa family decides to clean the beach and use the trash to make a miniature golf course.

programme.title: E301 - The Crew Builds A Vet Clinic / The Crew Builds A Mermaid Party
programme.desc: When the traveling veterinarian Dr. Diwa can't finish all her checkups in Builder Cove in time, Rubble & Crew know just what to do. // Lily's mermaid-themed birthday party is called off when it starts to rain. Time for a construction solution!

programme.title: E202 - Princess For A Day / Barbabeau's Adventure
programme.desc: Barbabelle proudly announces to her family that she wants to become a princess. // Barbabravo is moping with boredom, his brothers and sisters are all busy and no one wants to play with him.

programme.title: E108 - Double Booked
programme.desc: Tim tries to be at two parties at once.

programme.title: E124 - Treasure Hunt
programme.desc: Grandpa Pig hides some treasure in his garden, and when Peppa and George come, they have to look for it.

programme.title: E214 - The Louvre / Opposite Day
programme.desc: On a trip to Paris, the Barbapapa family will discover the most incredible museum: the Louvre! // Barbalala has decided to respect all the rules of the day of opposites.

programme.title: E725 - Super Smash Race
programme.desc: Get ready to crash and bash, 'cause today is the SUPER SMASH RACE! But when Crusher cheats and sends Zeg and Blaze far away, it's up to Blaze to help Zeg get back to the race, so he can slam and wham his way to a SMASH-tacular finish!

programme.title: E104 - Boots / Moon Parrot / Tailball
programme.desc: Tim tries out some new rocket boots which soon fly out of control. // Tim, Tommy and Tia bird-sit the Bronte's MoonParrot. // Tim, Tommy and Tia take on their parents at Tailball.

programme.title: E402 - Mito Dreams Of La Playa / Snake Bike
programme.desc: Dora helps her friend Mito the Yeti see the beach for the first time and he even wins the sandcastle competition! // On her way to the new bike park, Dora teaches Selena the Snake how to ride a bicycle.

programme.title: E604 - The Children's Fete
programme.desc: The school roof is leaky again, so the children organize a fair to raise money for a new roof.

programme.title: E217 - The Crew Builds A Rocket Ship Ride
programme.desc: Mix dreams about giving the moon a Mix makeover. Rubble and the pups make her dream a reality with a new boardwalk ride!

programme.title: E312 - The Crew Builds A Giant Tunnel
programme.desc: Park Ranger Rose and Rubble & Crew discover a meteorite outside of Builder Cove! But when Speed Meister and Mega Meister try to take it, the pups need their giant construction vehicles to save the town and get the meteorite to the Science Center.

programme.title: Focus
programme.desc: Keep up with the latest news from all over the globe with Focus on France 24. Focus programme provides exclusive reports from Monday to Friday at 7.50 am Paris time. Short videos contain facts, interviews with real people, numbers, statistics, everything you need to be aware of recent events in the world and of what is actually going on.

programme.title: Business
programme.desc: Business on France 24 gives you a perfect chance to get the business updates as they come and to be up to speed on international finances and economics. Business keeps you posted on everything that really matters in our fast moving world.

programme.title: Focus
programme.desc: Keep up with the latest news from all over the globe with Focus on France 24. Focus programme provides exclusive reports from Monday to Friday at 7.50 am Paris time. Find out what's going on in the world of economy, politics, culture, sport, medicine, ecology. Focus has it all covered for you. Short videos contain facts, interviews with real people, numbers, statistics, everything you need to be aware of recent events in the world and of what is actually going on.

programme.title: The Debate
programme.desc: Live debate show on the key topic of the day with four guests from different spots of the globe, from Monday to Thursday. Keep up with up-to-date issues from all over the world in politics, culture, sports, economy and healthcare. Get the latest facts and expert opinions about the most essential stories happening around us and draw your own conclusions. The show is well known for its dynamics due to live debates with its various guests.

programme.title: E7 - The Treehouse Badge
programme.desc: Duggee is cleaning the clubhouse so the squirrels take refuge in the treehouse, but it's getting a little bit cramped these days. Norrie has an idea - maybe they need to add an extension.

programme.title: E18 - Terracotta Army, China
programme.desc: Can the Go Jetters stop Glitch's noisy guitar and save the Terracotta Army in China?

programme.title: E4 - Panicky Percy
programme.desc: Percy causes confusion for everyone and prompts delays, when he spends too much time panicking over nothing.

programme.title: E8 - Bags Of Bags
programme.desc: Scarf Lady has misplaced Bag in the Big Shop, so Sarah and Duck help with the search.

programme.title: E21 - Kite
programme.desc: Stanley helps Little Woo and Seamus fly their new kite. It gets stuck up a tree and breaks. Using leaves and sticks, they build a better one, only for that to get stuck.

programme.title: E5 - I Like Tractors
programme.desc: From riding cows to having pigs in the house, the funny animals chat about everything brilliant about farms.

programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo hide under the house and spy on two mysterious tradies working in the backyard, wondering what they're up to.

programme.desc: When thunder and lightning scares the squirrels, Duggee teaches them about bravery.

programme.desc: After rideshare driver Carolina Vargas drove a nice stranger to his hotel, she didn't have qualms about giving him another ride. But her trusting gesture turned tragic.

programme.title: E2 - The Bond Of Brothers
programme.desc: After a woman's body is found in a neighbourhood dumpster, investigators narrow down their suspect list to three people, but will they be able to convince the men to break their brotherly bond?

programme.title: E7 - The Cost Of Happiness
programme.desc: One FBI undercover agent meets with suspects in Denmark in an effort to retrieve one of the world's lost treasures; another agent takes on an unlikely suspect believed to be planning a murder for hire.

programme.title: E11 - Devastation In Delta Township
programme.desc: Murders are rare in tranquil Delta Township. So when a well-liked couple is gunned down in their home, residents are terrified — until police discover the monster accidentally left a trail of breadcrumbs.

programme.title: E4 - A Deadly Heist
programme.desc: When jewellery seller Minerva Cantu, 26, is found bound, gagged and lifeless in her home, police suspect robbery as the motive.

programme.title: The Gothic Mystery - When Cathedrals Reached Up To The Heavens
programme.desc: Gothic architecture emerged in France in the 12th century. This architectural style revolutionized church construction, creating cathedrals that soared skywards. But where did the knowledge and technology for building these monuments come from?

programme.title: How Community Efforts Can Lead To Transformation
programme.desc: A video podcast from Kenya about community climate initiatives. Uganda's Bee Run; how citizen science improves air quality; and a resilient cotton returns to Senegal.

programme.title: Help, We've Been Hacked!
programme.desc: Ransomware poses an existential threat to businesses. It's a form of cybercrime that's a highly professional industry. The criminals operate like a business - but infiltrating systems, encrypting data, and extorting money.

programme.title: Saving Biodiversity: Can Innovation Stop Extinction?
programme.desc: Nearly a third of all species face extinction. From biodiversity credits to AI tools like BirdNET to efforts stop the spread of the dangerous Asian tiger mosquito, new solutions aim to protect biodiversity, ecosystems and human health.

programme.title: Mental Health: Ill Or Just Wired Differently?
programme.desc: Is a lack of concentration a sign of ADHD? Is a spell of feeling down actually depression? In Good Shape looks at mental health and neurodiversity.

programme.title: Help, We've Been Hacked!
programme.desc: Ransomware poses an existential threat to businesses. It's a form of cybercrime that's a highly professional industry. The criminals operate like a business - but infiltrating systems, encrypting data, and extorting money.

programme.title: What Happens When A Town Creates Its Own Currency?
programme.desc: If you join carsharing or buy solar panels, you get paid money in a currency of its own in the small town Traunstein at Lake Chiemsee in Germany. The trick: you can only spend the 'Chiemgauer” in stores and pubs in the region, which again should cut Co2 emissions. Does it work?

programme.title: Build Resilience: Climate-Conscious Cities, Homes And Coasts
programme.desc: Ancient sand dunes protect Tamil Nadu, urban planners design cities to be a shield against extreme weather. Plus: Building cyclone-resilient, sustainable homes.

programme.title: US Squawk Box
programme.desc: “Squawk Box” is the ultimate pre-market morning news and talk program, where the biggest names in business and politics tell their most important stories. programme.title: Closing Bell: Overtime
programme.desc: When the bell rings, the action does not end. “Closing Bell: Overtime” takes you through all of the after-hours moves including breaking news, corporate earnings and post-market trading. programme.title: E38 - Thanksgiving Dinner
programme.desc: 100 years ago, some of the biggest staples of Thanksgiving Dinner weren't around...until a few iconic brands used technological advances to reinvent turkey, stuffing, cranberry sauce, pumpkin pie and more.

programme.title: E9 - Alton City Escape
programme.desc: Quawntay Adams gets caught up in a big marijuana bust and is sentenced to a long prison term. When he finds out he is going to be a father, he determines to break out of his maximum-security cell.

programme.title: E1 - Sunken Nazi Secrets
programme.desc: Treasure hunter Darrel Miklos is embarking on a mission to solve one of the most intriguing mysteries in history: the disappearance of the Nazi's looted WWII treasure, estimated to be worth billions.

programme.title: E13 - Everything In The Air All At Once
programme.desc: As the team conducts their most complex experiment ever at the Triangle, they are stunned as a number of bizarre events unfold before their eyes.

programme.title: E252 - The Whistleblowers
programme.desc: Crashed UFOs. Recovered alien entities. For decades, incredible claims have been made about an extraterrestrial presence on Earth-and the government has gone to great lengths to discredit them.

programme.title: E11 - Judas Snake
programme.desc: Troy and Pickle track a high-tech snake. Bill and Tes search for a new hot spot. Dusty discovers one of his favourite honey holes has changed forever. Zak and Bruce chase the snakes and get a surprise.

programme.title: Bhabi Ji Ghar Par Hai! E2819
programme.desc: In this hilarious comedy, two neighboring couples, the Mishras and the Tiwaris, navigate the chaos that ensues when each husband develops a crush on the other's wife!

programme.title: Bhabi Ji Ghar Par Hai! E2819
programme.desc: In this hilarious comedy, two neighboring couples, the Mishras and the Tiwaris, navigate the chaos that ensues when each husband develops a crush on the other's wife!

programme.title: Windy Weather Watching
programme.desc: Darwin and Newts build a wind speed-and-direction measuring device to warn when the rain is coming.

programme.title: The Buzz on Bugs
programme.desc: Eric learns that insects have a head, thorax, abdomen, antennae, and six legs. He is surprised to find out that spiders are not insects – they are arachnids.

programme.title: Wind Beneath Your Wings
programme.desc: Eric learns how to make the perfect paper plane using symmetry. He finds out that real planes use the same principle as paper planes – when the fins point up and air hits them at high speed, the front of the plane is pushed up and the plane rises.

programme.title: Marble Maze
programme.desc: How do you make a marble-ous maze? We'll show you step by step, so you don't get lost.

programme.title: Teaming up with NASA
programme.desc: Many private companies are working with NASA to make space exploration more efficient. Host Emily Calandrelli visits the Sierra Nevada Corporation, which is building a spacecraft that can deliver cargo to and from the International Space Station.

programme.title: The Buzz on Bugs
programme.desc: Eric learns that insects have a head, thorax, abdomen, antennae, and six legs. He is surprised to find out that spiders are not insects – they are arachnids.

programme.title: Wind Beneath Your Wings
programme.desc: Eric learns how to make the perfect paper plane using symmetry. He finds out that real planes use the same principle as paper planes – when the fins point up and air hits them at high speed, the front of the plane is pushed up and the plane rises.

programme.title: Time to Talk
programme.desc: Acro gymnast George has had enough of people misunderstanding his sport, and he is giving his classmates a presentation to let them know what it's like to be a world-class acrobatic gymnast. And Corey returns home from the World Championships in Russia.

programme.title: The Big Mystery
programme.desc: Today poor Sprout, the bunny, has painful gnashers, and the Junior Vets are here to help. There is a big mystery at the aquarium – why is Lucy, the sea lion, putting on so much weight? And the punky monkeys need vital nutrition.

programme.title: Crazy Craters
programme.desc: Eric learns that most asteroids burn out before they reach our planet. But sometimes, when they're super huge, they hit Earth and make really big craters. He does an experiment to show what would happen in that situation.

programme.title: Windy Weather Watching
programme.desc: Darwin and Newts build a wind speed-and-direction measuring device to warn when the rain is coming.

programme.title: Okefenokee Doki
programme.desc: The mosquitoes are driving Oto crazy, so he and Doki build a ‘bug trapper' device to solve the problem. To Mundi, this is wrong. What good are pesky flies and mosquitoes, anyway? Mundi makes off with the device in the plane, and hides it in Georgia's Okefenokee Swamp!

programme.title: Knights
programme.desc: Little Lewis follows every step in order to achieve his dream. After completing a plethora of thankless tasks at a young age, he moves on to the rank of ‘squire.' A chance to demonstrate his bravery on the battlefield, in order to be knighted, at last.

programme.title: Knights
programme.desc: Little Lewis follows every step in order to achieve his dream. After completing a plethora of thankless tasks at a young age, he moves on to the rank of ‘squire.' A chance to demonstrate his bravery on the battlefield, in order to be knighted, at last.

programme.title: The Duel
programme.desc: DiktaThor challenges Sprinter to a duel. Due to the ancient Bhilka rules, Sprinter has to accept the challenge. The duel covers three classic disciplines: work-juice-belting, keep-breath-longest, and soap-bubble-shooting. Who is going to win?

programme.title: Bongo on Stage
programme.desc: The white orangutan Bongo is going to perform a tango dance at Milky and Choc's circus! Everyone can't wait for the show apart from Bongo, who hides in the Clubhouse! Luckily, the Buffycats help him gain confidence and overcome anxiety!

programme.title: Lemon Cookies
programme.desc: While singing, Telmo and Tula prepare some delicious lemon cookies. Once they finish kneading the dough, they will need to fill many cooking molds.

programme.title: Frog
programme.desc: Binah and Grandad are fascinated to learn that a group of frogs is called an army and begin to wonder which one might be the general. Flip, Flop, and Flow pretend to be amphibians. And Tiny and Daddy Owl are worried about Mommy, who can't stop coughing.

programme.title: Student-Astronaut Contest
programme.desc: One lucky student wins the prize of going to Hawaii to experience the HI-SEAS habitat, which simulates life on Mars. Host Emily Calandrelli joins the contest winner in this special episode.

programme.title: Electromagnetic Attraction
programme.desc: Eric learns how to make an electromagnet using a nail, a battery and some electrical wire. The electricity passing through the wire creates an invisible force called a magnetic field, making the nail work like a magnet. He uses it to pick up paper clips from the table.

programme.title: Sensational Senses!
programme.desc: Eric is blindfolded and has to figure out what a mystery object is using his other four senses – hearing, taste, touch and smell. He learns that although most animals have the same senses people do, they use them differently.

programme.title: First Day at Vet School
programme.desc: Today Sam and Saira help test lonely pony Brie for a life-threatening illness. Will and Amblessed carry out delicate surgery on a rowdy raccoon at a local zoo. And Lauren and desperate-for-a-pet Morgan try to find out what's wrong with Ronnie's sore leg.

programme.title: Crazy Craters
programme.desc: Eric learns that most asteroids burn out before they reach our planet. But sometimes, when they're super huge, they hit Earth and make really big craters. He does an experiment to show what would happen in that situation.

programme.title: Both Sides of The Blade
programme.desc: When her ex-boyfriend returns, a woman finds herself conflicted between her loving partner and rekindling an old flame.

programme.title: Pain and Glory
programme.desc: A film director reflects on the choices he's made in life as past and present come crashing down around him.

programme.title: E2 - Arctic Circle Or Bust In A Mercedes-Benz G65 Amg!
programme.desc: Jonny Lieberman and Justin Bell take the Twin-Turbo V12 G65 AMG on a mischievous trip through the lands of Sweden.

programme.title: E2 - Shopping Trips
programme.desc: Michael embarks on some shopping trips to the US and tries to get his airplane business off the ground.

programme.title: E10 - The Last Stand
programme.desc: For three generations the Pelletier family have braved its wilds, continuing to live a proud tradition of which today they are among the last: 7 brothers, no rules.

programme.title: E16 - Revving Up The 31 Ford Hotrod
programme.desc: The ‘31 Ford build has been at a stand still until the necessary parts finally arrive and the build can move forward, but a wiring mistake almost burns the car to ground

programme.title: E2 - Pickups And Slams
programme.desc: Chuck and Rick set out to customize a 1940 Ford pickup for a hoarder, and enable his quadriplegic son to drive again....

programme.title: E12 - Mythbusted And Rusted
programme.desc: Mythbuster Tory Belleci shows off his '73 Camaro that put the myth that cars can run on moonshine to the test and Todd has a surprise in store for him

programme.title: Blood Vs. Duty[Live]
programme.desc: Two brothers separated in a maritime tragedy grow up on opposite sides of the law - one a dedicated Intelligence Officer, the other fiercely protective of the Tausug family that raised him. When a corruption case pits them against each other, their long-buried secret threatens to ignite a war between blood and loyalty.

programme.title: Lavender Fields
programme.desc: Jasmin Flores lives a peaceful life in her mountain hometown until she falls for Arthur Pelaez, a man hiding dark secrets. Arthur is tied to a powerful gun cartel and trapped in a marriage to Iris Buenavidez. When Arthur becomes a target over stolen money, Jasmin loses everything and reinvents herself as Lavender Fields, seeking revenge against those who destroyed her life. The series blends romance, betrayal, and vengeance in a high-stakes world of crime and family power struggles.

USL '25/26 E21 -Dallas Trinity v Spokane Zephyr
Snow League '25/26 E4 -LAAX, Switzerland, Snowboard H/L
Snow League '25/26 E4 -LAAX, Switzerland, Snowboard H/L
E2
programme.desc: 講述一位懷抱著成為名作家夢想的志願生，雖然父親期望他成為像「尹東柱」這樣的劃時代詩人而取名，但現實是只有一身債務的作家志願生陸東柱，和來歷不明、有著特殊能力的少年姜山超越時間的界限一起尋找真相並創造奇蹟的過程。

programme.title: E15
programme.desc: 劇情講述一個少女的失蹤交織著無數的謊言和慾望，牽涉其中的七個人遭遇重大事件後發生的故事。這七個人都會為了個人私慾背叛，出賣他人，過著充滿謊言的生活。​

programme.title: E6
programme.desc: 故事背景設定在不久的將來，在這個世界中，人們過去的性關係通過一條發光的紅色「S線」在他們頭頂上方以視覺方式連接。一位刑警、一位神秘的老師，以及一個天生能看到這些線的少女，共同應對由這一現象引發的系列令人不安的事件。

programme.title: E1788
programme.desc: The Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. Between romance and crime thriller, with a blend of comic and serious themes, their stories weave a fascinating web.

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2:2025-2026

programme.desc: A programme devoted to heritage, history and knowledge, which combines a local focus with the wider picture. The reports feature people with a passion for what they do, cultural professionals and those who are proactive in their lives, who make the link between past and present.

programme.title: E101 - Forgeti/Buggin' The Buggs/Franken-Fight/Billy Bajillions/The Ring Leader
programme.desc: When Gwen drags Ben along on a hike in search of the legendary Forgeti - a yeti that makes people forget they ever saw it - Ben is dubious. But with Dr. Animo on the trail of the mythical beast as well, what looks like a hoax becomes a hero time adventure for the ages... if Ben can remember it ever happened.

programme.title: E10 - Prank Callers/More Smarter/Stick Hockey/T.G.I. Tuesday/Survival Skills
programme.desc: Mordecai and Rigby decide to make prank phone calls. They try to prank the Master Prank Caller numerous times, although they fail to fool him (and only make him increasingly annoyed).

programme.title: E108 - It's Totally A Test
programme.desc: Toby secretly tells the Spies that Zerlina is preparing a test for them. So when they investigate Vikings coming alive at the museum they assume it’s a set up until things get completely out of hand. Now a tourist boat is under attack by a Viking ship!

programme.title: E21 - B. The Banana/The Phone/The Job/Halloween/The Treasure
programme.desc: Darwin lends his pen to Banana Joe but, when it comes back chewed, Gumball's thoughts turn to revenge.

programme.title: E121 - Ask Not What Bunnies Can Do For You
programme.desc: It’s student council elections at Acme Loo! Babs and Buster both run for President, and they enlist Sweetie and Hamton as their respective campaign managers. That just leaves Plucky…who happily revels in the drama!

programme.title: E1358 - Tv Knight 7/We'll Be Right Back/Jump City Rock/Natural Gas/The Score
programme.desc: To avoid chores, Batman and Gordon time travel to the future, but still find ways to watch TV.

programme.title: E7
programme.desc: Hiiragi Kanade (Fukuchi Momoko) arrives in Noto as a volunteer and unexpectedly ends up launching a community radio station with the local residents. But there's no experience, no budget, and no studio - only a shared desire to bring light back to a town hurt by earthquakes and torrential rain. Once the broadcast begins, there's no turning back. A nonstop entertainment drama where ordinary citizens find themselves becoming stars.

programme.title: WTA 26 Upper Austria Ladies Linz E3[Live]
WTA 26 Upper Austria Ladies Linz E3
WTA 26 Upper Austria Ladies Linz E3
WTA 26 Upper Austria Ladies Linz E5[Live]
WTA 26 Upper Austria Ladies Linz E6[Live]
WTA 26 Upper Austria Ladies Linz E5
WTA 26 Upper Austria Ladies Linz E6
E3 - Water Worlds
programme.desc: Wade into wetlands, where trees and water meet to nurture new life. Dive into an underwater forest that protects young fur seals, visit a mangrove sanctuary where a curious band of aquatic misfits hides out, and meet some real-life swamp monsters.

programme.title: E4 - Mountains
programme.desc: Climb into a realm of thin air and towering rock. Tag along as mythical monkeys battle for a winter food stash, sing along with lemurs in a fruit-filled tree canopy, and watch an aromatic tree bring together blossom and possum in a moonlit tryst.

programme.title: E6 - To the Rescue
programme.desc: Meet more Amazing Animal Friends, including “ranch manager” Barclay, a Great Dane who happens to be a gifted horse whisperer. In Africa, a tiny marmoset called Thor has become obsessed with two young rescued mongooses.

programme.title: E2 - Laos: the Mountain Wilds
programme.desc: Steep mountains and tropical monsoons define the Mekong River valley on its route through Laos. Catch glimpses of the wildlife who find refuge in its vibrant ecosystems, from stump-tailed macaques to pied kingfishers to black-crested gibbons.

programme.title: E2 - Adapt Or Die
programme.desc: Feel the heat when the pride tries to hunt down adequate food as drought conditions push them (and their prey) dangerously close to death. Watch Einstein adapt to solo life, then assess the damage after new mom Kalwezi fights for her cubs’ lives.

programme.title: E3 - Water Worlds
programme.desc: Wade into wetlands, where trees and water meet to nurture new life. Dive into an underwater forest that protects young fur seals, visit a mangrove sanctuary where a curious band of aquatic misfits hides out, and meet some real-life swamp monsters.

programme.title: E3 - Hide and Seek
programme.desc: Contend with the challenges of the rainy season, which turns everything green and spoils the lions’ camouflage. Watch Einstein fail to make new connections and weigh the pros and cons when Keeza and her cub are kidnapped by rival male Mad-Eye Moody.

programme.title: E5 - Fight Club
programme.desc: Step into the ring with nature’s top brawlers, who use violence to get what they need. Watch the cannibalistic Portia spider devour the competition, uncover the bloodthirsty side of cuddly koalas, and catch an epic neck-whipping giraffe battle.

programme.title: E6 - Gangsters
programme.desc: Get inside the toughest gangs that roam the Earth and see what true grit looks like in the wild. Chase a band of marauding locusts, watch the coconut octopus ambush its next meal, and meet a flock of finches who’ve developed a taste for blood.

programme.title: E3 - Thailand: Coming of Age
programme.desc: The temperate north meets the tropical south along the Mekong’s banks in Thailand. Follow the river through the Golden Triangle and see the courtship dances of the region’s abundant bird species. Then take in a festival honouring water spirits.

programme.title: E5 - Fight Club
programme.desc: Step into the ring with nature’s top brawlers, who use violence to get what they need. Watch the cannibalistic Portia spider devour the competition, uncover the bloodthirsty side of cuddly koalas, and catch an epic neck-whipping giraffe battle.

programme.title: E6 - Gangsters
programme.desc: Get inside the toughest gangs that roam the Earth and see what true grit looks like in the wild. Chase a band of marauding locusts, watch the coconut octopus ambush its next meal, and meet a flock of finches who’ve developed a taste for blood.

programme.title: E6 - Gangsters
programme.desc: Get inside the toughest gangs that roam the Earth and see what true grit looks like in the wild. Chase a band of marauding locusts, watch the coconut octopus ambush its next meal, and meet a flock of finches who’ve developed a taste for blood.

programme.title: E6 - To the Rescue
programme.desc: Meet more Amazing Animal Friends, including “ranch manager” Barclay, a Great Dane who happens to be a gifted horse whisperer. In Africa, a tiny marmoset called Thor has become obsessed with two young rescued mongooses.

programme.title: E2 - Laos: the Mountain Wilds
programme.desc: Steep mountains and tropical monsoons define the Mekong River valley on its route through Laos. Catch glimpses of the wildlife who find refuge in its vibrant ecosystems, from stump-tailed macaques to pied kingfishers to black-crested gibbons.

programme.title: E3 - Thailand: Coming of Age
programme.desc: The temperate north meets the tropical south along the Mekong’s banks in Thailand. Follow the river through the Golden Triangle and see the courtship dances of the region’s abundant bird species. Then take in a festival honouring water spirits.

programme.title: E10
programme.desc: Yum Jung-ah, Ahn Eun-jin, Park Jun-myun, Dex and special guests are visiting seaside villages in Korea. They will live there and cook fresh seasonal dishes using ingredients from the sea.

programme.desc: 4 mad men, starving for dopamine and thrills, are setting off in search of the 'craziest' challenges hidden around the world.

programme.desc: Judge Lee Han-young, who regains consciousness after an unjust death, returns to the past to punish the wrongdoers and change his fate.

programme.desc: Star chef Sam Kim will teach you how to make all kinds of delicious dishes – from Italian pasta, Spanish food to desserts! Follow his easy recipes and enjoy cooking!

programme.title: Apoy Sa Dugo
programme.desc: A psychological thriller and family-centered drama about sibling rivalry-where love for family can turn into obsession. Bound by blood yet divided by choices, it's a gripping story of secrets, betrayal, and revenge-proving that sometimes, the deepest wounds come from the people you trust most.

programme.title: The Seven Angels
programme.desc: In an unprecedented and sensational move, the police force dismisses seven policewomen simultaneously. They are The Flirt, Diety, Gold-digger, Sherry Holmes, Sixfooter Plus, Plump and Sgt. Crab-pincers. In fact, they are all assigned to a case to catch a sex fiend who has already murdered four night club hostesses. The seven girls work at the biggest night club Crime City Club after training. A promotional gimmick launches: prize for the team of hostesses with the most votes from customers. QE's team jumps to the lead and has a good laugh at the former policewomen. Crab-pincers is angered. Putting aside their assignment, she and her girls go to war to win customers and votes. At the same time, a sex magazine photographer Big John, who happens to be QE's brother, invites The Flirt to a photo session...

programme.title: Point Of No Return
programme.desc: After police detective Lau is ambushed and killed, his best friend Pitt vows to get the killer. A series of investigation follows. Pitt finally finds an eyewitness to the killing - Fat Goose who is persuaded to testify against the killer Lam Man Fu. Lam Man Fu chases and attacks Pitt and Fat Goose. Finally, Pitt arrests him but Superintendent Keung frees Lam Man Fu and removes Pitt from the case. Then Lam Man Fu firebombs Fat Goose's residence. Fat Goose moves into Pitt's home and strikes a fast friendship with Angel, Pitt's reporter sister...

programme.title: Point Of No Return
programme.desc: After police detective Lau is ambushed and killed, his best friend Pitt vows to get the killer. A series of investigation follows. Pitt finally finds an eyewitness to the killing - Fat Goose who is persuaded to testify against the killer Lam Man Fu. Lam Man Fu chases and attacks Pitt and Fat Goose. Finally, Pitt arrests him but Superintendent Keung frees Lam Man Fu and removes Pitt from the case. Then Lam Man Fu firebombs Fat Goose's residence. Fat Goose moves into Pitt's home and strikes a fast friendship with Angel, Pitt's reporter sister...

programme.desc: Join Patrick in the Great Plains of North America, as he explores the intricate web that connects grasses and dung beetles to bison and the grizzly bear.

programme.desc: Chef Edward Lee and Ryu Sooyoung explore Korea's summer seafood traditions, starting in Gwangju where they fight the heat with hot croaker soup.

E2
programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: 在福建小島漁村長大的段宇成夢想成為一名跳高運動員，在助教羅娜的循序善誘之下，不僅訓練成績突飛猛進，兩人也在朝夕相處過程中情愫悄悄滋生，最終段宇成突破了極限也同時收穫了和羅娜的真摯愛情。

programme.title: E40
programme.desc: 消防局長宋焰（楊洋飾）和急診科醫生許沁（王楚然飾）分別十年之後重逢，青春時代的兩人因家庭反對被迫分開，再相見時，兩人都有了許多成長和改變。由於工作性質的原因，宋焰和許沁漸漸有了交集。宋焰帶領十里台的消防員們為維護人民生命財產安全而英勇奮鬥，經歷了無數次血與火的生死考驗後仍不改初心。他的堅持感染著許沁，困擾他們多年的心結也漸漸被解開。兩人克服家庭阻力，最後重新走到一起，互相鼓勵，共同進步，用各自的專長守護著這座美麗的城市。

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

programme.title: E8
programme.desc: 《一閃一閃亮星星》講述了林北星意外刪除舊手機中的短信回到過去，重新認識了昔日陌路校友張萬森，從而展開一段奇妙的時空拯救之旅的故事。

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: 程家女名少商，因戰亂自幼被父母留在祖母身邊成為“留守兒童”，嬸孃狼心縱容，意圖將其養成廢人。面對重重陷阱，程少商（趙露思飾）為活命，假荒誕、真苦學，掩蓋鋒芒等待父母歸來。可撥開烏雲見月明時，卻因多年疏離致使親情已難再拾。缺愛的程少商，遇新帝義子凌不疑（吳磊飾）、白鹿山才子袁慎、世家子弟樓垚，三人各有優劣。在選擇適婚者上，程少商既自卑又務實，儘管情感之路頗多坎坷，但她從不後悔自己的每次選擇。在與凌不疑的相處之中，也陰差陽錯捲入了凌不疑的家庭與身世之謎中。種種事件，程少商屢立奇功，也從凌不疑的家庭關係中學會與父母相處之道，以及如何經營自己的愛情。同時程少商與凌不疑也在這些經歷中各自變化成長，慢慢與自己和家庭和解，並堅守內心的正義，攜手化解國家危機，成就一段佳話。

programme.title: E40
programme.desc: 消防局長宋焰（楊洋飾）和急診科醫生許沁（王楚然飾）分別十年之後重逢，青春時代的兩人因家庭反對被迫分開，再相見時，兩人都有了許多成長和改變。由於工作性質的原因，宋焰和許沁漸漸有了交集。宋焰帶領十里台的消防員們為維護人民生命財產安全而英勇奮鬥，經歷了無數次血與火的生死考驗後仍不改初心。他的堅持感染著許沁，困擾他們多年的心結也漸漸被解開。兩人克服家庭阻力，最後重新走到一起，互相鼓勵，共同進步，用各自的專長守護著這座美麗的城市。

programme.title: E40
programme.desc: 消防局長宋焰（楊洋飾）和急診科醫生許沁（王楚然飾）分別十年之後重逢，青春時代的兩人因家庭反對被迫分開，再相見時，兩人都有了許多成長和改變。由於工作性質的原因，宋焰和許沁漸漸有了交集。宋焰帶領十里台的消防員們為維護人民生命財產安全而英勇奮鬥，經歷了無數次血與火的生死考驗後仍不改初心。他的堅持感染著許沁，困擾他們多年的心結也漸漸被解開。兩人克服家庭阻力，最後重新走到一起，互相鼓勵，共同進步，用各自的專長守護著這座美麗的城市。

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

programme.title: E8
programme.desc: 《一閃一閃亮星星》講述了林北星意外刪除舊手機中的短信回到過去，重新認識了昔日陌路校友張萬森，從而展開一段奇妙的時空拯救之旅的故事。

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: 在福建小島漁村長大的段宇成夢想成為一名跳高運動員，在助教羅娜的循序善誘之下，不僅訓練成績突飛猛進，兩人也在朝夕相處過程中情愫悄悄滋生，最終段宇成突破了極限也同時收穫了和羅娜的真摯愛情。

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE delivers the latest from Japan, Asia, and the rest of the world. While covering wide network of correspondents breaking news and developing stories, offering a perspective from this corner of the globe, a team of trusted anchors ties it all together to give you a picture of what's happening now, and what's ahead.

E156 - Gatha Shiv Parivar Ki - Ganesh Kartikeya
programme.desc: The untold story of the divine brothers of the Shiv Parivaar - Lord Ganesh & Lord Kartikeya. They are a family bound by devotion, challenged by destiny and united by eternal love.

programme.title: E156 - Gatha Shiv Parivar Ki - Ganesh Kartikeya
programme.desc: The untold story of the divine brothers of the Shiv Parivaar - Lord Ganesh & Lord Kartikeya. They are a family bound by devotion, challenged by destiny and united by eternal love.

programme.title: E139 - Mehndi Wala Ghar
programme.desc: This is a story of the coming together of a disintegrated joint family in Ujjain that once lived by their motto, 'A family that eats together, prays together, stays together!'

programme.title: E1 - Hui Gumm Yaadein
programme.desc: Dr. Dev Mehta, a top surgeon who can't remember his own skills & past 8 years of life. now, forced to restart as an intern and have to re-learn medicine and face the family he no longer knows

programme.title: E4677 - Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The lively and diverse residents of Gokuldham Housing Society live together as one big family. They navigate everyday challenges, celebrate festivals and find joy in each other's company.

programme.title: E199 - Itti Si Khushi
programme.desc: An Indian adaptation of the acclaimed international series 'Shameless'. The plot centers around Anvita, the eldest sister, who looks after her five siblings as her father struggles with alcoholism.

programme.desc: An epic tale that explores the eternal battle between good and evil, highlighting the quest for righteousness and spiritual awakening

programme.title: E2 - A Big Day of Teamwork & Fixes!
programme.desc: It's a big day of teamwork & fixes at Gecko's Garage! When the Mechanicals accidentally injure Gecko's foot, they must learn the value of teamwork to finish repairing Bobby the Bus by themselves. Then, when Green Mechanical gets stressed, Gecko teaches her mindfulness tips to calm down. The teamwork continues as Gecko helps his rival, Mr. Weasel, fix an engine with a clean electric one, & the whole crew works together to repair Trevor the Tractor's giant gears!

programme.title: E1 - Game Day Goofs & Grandma's Fixes!
programme.desc: Get ready for game day goofs & Grandma's amazing fixes! The fun starts with a basketball game, but when Max the Monster Truck tries a slam dunk, he breaks his suspension & gets a teddy bear stuck in the hoop! Then, when Gecko gets a boo boo while trying to fix Bobby the Bus's mixed-up controls, Grandma Gecko arrives just in time to help with the repair. The day ends with Grandma's own goof, as she starts sleepwalking during a sleepover!

programme.title: E1 - Epic Rescues & Weasel's Fails!
programme.desc: Get ready for epic rescues & Mr. Weasel's hilarious fails! The chaos begins when Weasel fills Max the Monster Truck's tires with helium, causing him to float away & forcing Gecko to perform a sky-high rescue! Then, Weasel's plan to give Molly extra bouncy springs goes wrong, & Gecko has to help her stop bouncing. The rescues continue when Weasel's new electro-magnet sucks up Baby Truck & the Mechanicals, & Gecko has to save the day!

programme.title: 2026 Jiangsu Count Down Concert (Repackaged)
programme.desc: 晚會再一次發揮「技術+藝術」的融合優勢，為文藝創作注入全新活力，推陳出新的創作理念；李宇春、周筆暢、周深、薛之謙、毛不易、單依純等實力唱將，在跨年舞台上構築起傳統文化與當代審美的精神共鳴，一起迎接更好的2026。

programme.title: E15 - 喜迎收官 出發團合唱
programme.desc: 出發團老成員沈騰、白敬亭、金晨、賈冰、胡先煦、王安宇、范丞丞攜手再次奔赴自然秘境，沉浸式領略各地的美麗風景；以「金木水火土」為主題線索，踏上野外探險之旅，將旅行與挑戰深度綁定，足跡從西藏林芝、齊齊哈爾等國內秘境延伸至海外極端環境。

programme.title: E2 - 奧運名城體驗射擊
programme.desc: 由黎明、林依晨、魏晨、謝依霖、鄭元暢、盛一倫、朱珠、李小鵬、王濛、潘曉婷、唐曉天、陳楚河共十二位明星和奧運冠軍參加，以輪換搭檔的形式，在全球十二座體育城市展開一系列競技PK。

programme.title: E8 - 夜游燈塔 解密平凡而偉大的秘密
programme.desc: 繼續重磅集結，除了經驗豐富的 “全勤者” 吳奇隆外，新成員林峯、丁禹兮、林允、趙小棠也加入「追星團」；在「星空日記」的魔法下，將打游戲的宅男、疲憊的職場打工人和沉浸於網上沖浪的情侶帶出原有空間一路滑行到戶外，讓受困於都市生活的他們探尋星空與美好的秘密。
